change_comments.message: Sorry it was a bit longer for Gerrit and un-indented but still is the only way to review it.

inline_comments.message:
do u think we should flip #89 and 90 ??
first let it update and then only mark the batch as done.
No. If an exception occurred while updating the state (e.g. DB timeout), then the counter would not decrement, meaning that worker thread would not process any more batches.
FYI, the batchCounter is used for controlling the multi-threaded workers. I will be posting another patch that gets rid of the counter using Semaphore instead.
alright if we are getting rid of this then lets see in the other patch.thnx.
